name: Macadamia Nut and White Chocolate Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add the eggs and mix well.
4. Thoroughly combine the flour, baking soda, and salt in a separate bowl. Stir until well blended.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, mixing until just combined. If needed, add a little more flour to achieve a slightly stiff dough.
6. Stir in the white chocolate and macadamia nuts.
7. Drop heaping teaspoons of dough onto ungreased baking sheets, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
8. Flatten each cookie slightly with the back of a spoon.
9. Bake for 13-15 minutes, or until lightly golden.
10. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
